title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
slides: Theker raised $85M to build the opposite of a specialist robot.
Most factory robots today do one task perfectly for 10 years.
Theker's robot learns any task from videos, no reprogramming.
Your factory now adapts in days, not years, for free.
Stop buying dedicated robots. One machine can replace them all.
thread_text:
Your factory robot just got obsolete.

Theker raised $85M to build a machine that learns any task from watching a video.

Old robots do one job for a decade.
That model is dead. This one adapts in days.

No reprogramming needed.
Just show it a video of the task. It learns on its own.

Stop buying dedicated robots.
One machine can replace them all. Your factory retools for free.

Does your current setup lock you into one product?
Test Theker's approach on one line this quarter.
video_script: $85 million for a robot that learns.
This one watches and learns tasks.
Your factory adapts in days now.
One machine replaces all the rest.

instagram.caption:
$85M just burned down the old factory robot model 🏭💥

Most factory robots today do one task for a decade. Theker’s upcoming machine learns any new task from a video — no reprogramming, no downtime 😮

Your production line can now retool in days, not years, for free 💸

One robot replaces every dedicated machine you own. Are your current robots locking you into a single product, or are you ready to test theirs on one line this quarter? 🔄
